config.script:
"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 27/03/2024
		Purpose: Set focus on Username field.	
	"""
	system.perspective.print("called on start up")
	system.perspective.sendMessage("UserNameFocus", scope='page')
	self.getChild("root").getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntLogin").getChild("cntColumn").getChild("txtUserName").focus()

# Description - Calls message handler to start authontication process
	system.perspective.print("on click enter")
	if event.key == 'Enter':
		system.perspective.sendMessage("Auth",payload = {}, scope = "page")

"""
		Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
		Written Date: 27/03/2024
		Purpose: set focus on self.	
	"""
	self.focus()

onChange.script:
"""
		Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
		Written Date: 27/03/2024
		Purpose: Set focus on password field	
	"""
	self.getSibling("txtPassword").focus()

messageHandlers.script:
# implement your handler here """ Written By: Amitkumar Ravat Written Date: 22/08/2024 Purpose: Send OTP to valid users. """ try: userName = self.getSibling("txtUserName").props.text userPassword = self.getSibling("txtPassword").props.text dataset = Project_VECV.NamedQuery.Login.Authenticate.isAuthenticate(userName, userPassword) pyData = system.dataset.toPyDataSet(dataset) for data in pyData: isAuthenticate = data['Result'] #Authenticate MES User if isAuthenticate == 1: self.session.custom.loggedInUserId = data["Id"] self.session.custom.loggedInUser = data["UserName"] self.session.custom.IsLoggedIn = True self.session.custom.UserRoleID = data["MST_Role_Id"] #Authenticate AD User user_details =Project_VECV.ActiveDirectory.ActiveDirectoryUsers.getUserDetails(userName) if str(user_details).upper() == 'None'.upper(): warningMessage = "Entered UserName is not added In Active Directory." state = "warning" Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(warningMessage), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","") else: roleId = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Login/getRole",{'userName':userName}) system.perspective.print("role Id%s"%roleId) #check role is operator if yes then no OTP required if roleId == 2: system.perspective.sendMessage("buttonClick",payload = {}, scope = "page") else: # Specify the user source (replace 'VECV' with your actual AD user source name if changed in future) Project_VECV.PopUp.loader.openLoader(True) user_source = "VECV" # Get the user object from the user source user = system.user.getUser(user_source, userName) if user is not None: # Get user details email = str(user.getContactInfo()[0]).split(':')[1].strip() #OTP generation self.session.custom.OTP = Project_VECV.ActiveDirectory.OTP.getOTP() #Mail Body body = "

MES OTP Authentication

" body += "

Please enter Below OTP to Complete MES Authentication.

" body += str(self.session.custom.OTP) body += "

" body+="

If you did not requested for this OTP, Please ignore the mail or contact support

" recipients = [str(email)] #Mail Sending system.net.sendEmail("","qdigitalization@vecvnet.com", "MES OTP Auth", body, 1, recipients, smtpProfile = 'SMTPEmail') Project_VECV.PopUp.loader.openLoader(False) #open Popup to enter OTP system.perspective.openPopup("#OTP", "Project_VECV/Templates/OTPView",{'Email':email}) elif isAuthenticate == -2: warningMessage = "Invalid Credentials" state = "warning" Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(warningMessage), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","") elif isAuthenticate == -1: warningMessage = "Inactive User. Please Contact System Administrator." state = "warning" Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(warningMessage), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","") else: warningMessage = "Credentials Expired. Please Contact System Administrator." state = "warning" Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(warningMessage), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","") except: screenName ='Login' filePath=str('Project_VECV/Login/Login') errorFunction = str('Message Handler:Auth -> btnSubmit') errorType=str('Application') errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID()) description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

config.script:
"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 27/03/2024
		Purpose: Clear username and password field.	
	"""
#	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntLogin").getChild("cntColumn").getChild("txtUserName").focus()
	system.perspective.sendMessage("UserNameFocus")
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntLogin").getChild("cntColumn").getChild("txtUserName").props.text = ''
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntLogin").getChild("cntColumn").getChild("txtPassword").props.text = ''
